mechanism: Fallen angel events ($200-400B BBB- at risk) convert gradual credit deterioration into discrete correlation-flipping events through mechanical IG-mandated forced selling that overwhelms HY absorption capacity ($50-100B). Each historical instance (2002, 2005, 2020) coincided with negative correlation shifts.
regime_dependence: Requires sufficient concentration of BBB- debt near downgrade triggers AND a macro catalyst. Currently building vulnerability but no imminent trigger.
